title: Bedrock Golem
description: Adds Bedrock Golem in minecraft without replacing the original iron golem.
body:
OptiFine is required

Introduction:

This datapack aims to add Bedrock Golem in minecraft without replacing the original iron golem and it supports versions from 1.16.2 to 1.21.4.

Bedrock Golem's Stats:

  1. HP ♥: 1024 (512 hearts)
  2. AP 🛡: 30 (15 armor with 20 units of toughness)
  3. Behaviour : Passive (Default), Neutral, or Hostile, can be configured from toggle menu (see admin commands).
  4. Super Powers 🦸‍♂️:
    • Super Swift (or Super Jump) : Bedrock Golem uses its Super Swift Power to attack flying mobs. It even uses super swift
    • Void Slowness : Bedrock Golem uses the power of void to slow down nearby enemies.

Admin Commands:

  • /function summon:bedrock_golem
    Summons Bedrock Golem
  • /function give:spawn_egg/bedrock_golem
    Gives Bedrock Golem Spawn Egg.
  • /function toggles:bedrock_golem
    Opens Toggle Menu:
    1. Bedrock Golem's behaviour : Toggles Bedrock Golem's natural behaviour.
  • /function kill:bedrock_golem
    Kills Bedrock Golem
  • /function uninstall:bedrock_golem
    Uninstalls the datapack

Installation:

Open your .minecraft directory. Put the datapack into the saves/world_name/datapacks directory.
